syntax_and_semantics.rationale: Standard numeric types have direct native representations in modern stacks.

syntax_and_semantics.element: DIMENSION 1-indexed column-major matrix arrays (U, V, P)
syntax_and_semantics.rationale: Fortran arrays are 1-indexed and column-major. Modern C++ matrices (Eigen) are 0-indexed and default to row-major, requiring index shift refactoring and explicit ColMajor configuration.

architecture_and_state.rationale: Procedural main block and subprograms map directly to functions or static methods.
architecture_and_state.target_equivalent: C++ main() and stand-alone helper functions

architecture_and_state.rationale: Global variables must be encapsulated to avoid concurrency race conditions in modern multi-threaded architectures.
architecture_and_state.target_equivalent: C++ Struct / Configuration Singleton class passed by reference

dependencies_and_libraries.rationale: Finite difference computation loops map directly to loops or optimized vectorized linear algebra libraries.
dependencies_and_libraries.target_equivalent: Eigen matrix calculations / OpenMP parallel for loops

runtime_and_integration.rationale: Fixed-width scientific float outputs map cleanly to modern string interpolation.
